scope: Legacy-parity Linear GraphQL surface plus a typed Pass B blocker. The current bundle covers the 4 legacy root connections (issues, teams, projects, users). Full Linear GraphQL expansion is quarantined because every additional read connection and mutation shares POST /graphql and requires a fixed GraphQL request body plus cursor state in variables; the defs-only read path does not send stream.body, write actions cannot inject static GraphQL documents safely, and this workstream may not create or edit a hook package.

excluded.reason: bounded identity/connectivity check used by Check(), not a syncable object stream

Blocked by typed ENGINE_GAP in docs/migration/quarantine.json: Linear mutations require fixed GraphQL query documents and variables in the JSON body; the write dialect can only send record-shaped bodies, and exposing a generic GraphQL mutation body would violate connector tool-surface rules.

endpoints.path: /graphql (query: comments, cycles, labels, workflowStates, webhooks, other root connections)

excluded.reason: Blocked by typed ENGINE_GAP in docs/migration/quarantine.json: Linear read connections require POST request bodies and body-cursor pagination via variables, but the declarative read path currently sends nil body and this pass cannot add or edit a StreamHook.
